description: Recto: Legal note, probably a draft of an agreement about a quarrel between husband and wife. The husband is taking upon himself not to be absent from her. Mentioning names such as Mubārak and [...] b. Marzūq. Verso: Very faded dowry list. AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
